optical_board.description: Fabrica optical board used as the black locating/support board on the shared workspace.

table.note: Fabrica parts rest on the black optical board top surface, not directly on the table.

isaaclab_notes: This package is scene-only. It does not define actions, observations, rewards, resets, or policy logic.
Use the JSON assembly_target_poses to build future insertion objectives.
Run generation with an Isaac/Omniverse USD Python environment, not plain system Python.

scene_graph.note: Modify translations/rotations/scales here, then run scripts/json_to_usd.py to update scene/scene.usda.

objects.role: manipulator mounted on the shared work table
manipulator mounted on the shared work table
black Fabrica optical board placed on shared workspace; supports all loose and assembled parts
assembled reference composed from individual Fabrica parts
